articles.author: Alyssa Lukpat, Sabrina Siddiqui
articles.title: RFK Jr. Orders American Exposed to Hantavirus to Stay Quarantined Against Medical Advice - WSJ
articles.description: Health secretary says cruise passenger Angela Perryman has to stay isolated in Nebraska despite CDC report advising otherwise
articles.content:
Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. ordered an American passenger exposed to hantavirus on a cruise ship to remain in quarantine Monday against her will and despite expert advice.
Kennedy said th… [+347 chars]

articles.title: On June 9, 2026, NASA named Italian astronaut Luca Parmitano as pilot of Artemis 3, making him the first European ever assigned to an Artemis crew — and within hours ESA's director general framed the seat not as a courtesy but as the opening move in a ne - Space Daily
